_description: Baseline 1b — Single-stage U-Net, SMALL capacity [32,64,128,256] ~7.7M params. Architecture-matched control: this is one stage of the small cascades. Comparing the small cascades against this isolates 'what does the second stage add on top of one stage of the same size'. Comparing the large single U-Net against this isolates 'what does extra capacity alone buy'.
